PowerShell(cd "d:\\PUCP\\Último ciclo\\Tesis\\SafeCampus-PUCP\\docs"; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; Write-Output "===== CATALOGO ====="; python "$env:TEMP\\claude\\d--PUCP--ltimo-ciclo-Tesis-SafeCampus-PUCP\\a293670e-ae05-4d67-8ff9-a3826011dac0\\scratchpad\\read_xlsx.py" "Catalogo de Pruebas - App Movil Operador.xlsx" 6 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30; Write-Output "===== PLAN \(conteo\) ====="; python -c "import sys; sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\); from docx import Document; d=Document\('Plan de Pruebas - App Movil Operador.docx'\); print\('paragraphs', len\(d.paragraphs\), 'tables', len\(d.tables\)\); print\('traza rows', len\(d.tables[-3].rows\)\)")
